{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Jan
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Jan]] is present during the training session.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Jan]] is a person Kyri speaks to regarding teaching [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
